title: Admin and Marketing Executive
description:
Techwise Offshore Consultancy provides design & engineering, marine assurance and project consultancy services to the marine, offshore oil & gas and renewable energy industries.

We are looking for a highly organized and resourceful Admin & Marketing Executive to support both administrative operations and marketing initiatives within the offshore and marine industry.

Administrative Duties:

· Manage day-to-day office operations including scheduling, documentation, and correspondence with clients, suppliers, and internal teams.

· Maintain and update company records, tenders, service contracts, and project documentation.

· Coordinate logistics for staff travel, training, and vessel/shipyard-related activities.

· Support management with reports, meeting minutes, presentations, and project tracking.

Marketing Duties:

· Maintain client database.

· Manage digital marketing efforts including social media updates, newsletters and website content.

· Prepare marketing materials, brochures, and presentations tailored to marine clients and stakeholders.

· Represent the company at industry events, exhibitions, and networking opportunities.

· Liaise with oil & gas companies, marine contractors, shipowners, shipyards, and partners to strengthen client relationships and brand visibility.

Requirements

· Diploma/Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Maritime Studies, or related field.

· 1–3 years of relevant experience in administration and/or marketing; experience in the offshore/marine industry is a strong advantage.

· Familiarity with maritime terminology, industry practices, and regulatory requirements preferred.

· Strong organizational and multitasking skills with keen attention to detail.

· Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to liaise with internal teams and external stakeholders.

· Proficiency in MS Office; knowledge of marketing tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Illustrator, Mailchimp) is an advantage.

· Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and adapt to a fast-paced industry environment.

What We Offer

· Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits.

· Opportunities for career growth within the offshore & marine sector.

· A collaborative and supportive working environment with exposure to international clients and projects.

If you are interested, please send your application to career@techwise-offshore.com.

postedCompany.description:
Techwise Offshore Consultancy provides design & engineering, marine assurance and project consultancy servcies to the marine, offshore oil & gas and renewable energy industries.

Our people consist of highly qualified naval architects, structural engineers, geotechnical engineers, dynamic positioning specialists, marine engineers and master mariners.

We are headquartered in Singapore with experienced local marine surveyors based in Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam and China.
postedCompany.name: TECHWISE OFFSHORE CONSULTANCY PTE. LTD.
